net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar

Class Path

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar.Path

  • public class Path
extends java.lang.Object
    Path is a list of nodes which represent the calculated shortest path.
    Author:
    marc.engelmann

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Path()
      The Path constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void appendWayPoint(Node n)
      Append a waypoint to the end of the path.
      boolean contains(int x, int y)
      Check if this path contains the WayPoint.
      Path cutToPoint(Path path, Vector point) 
      Node get(int index)
      This method returns a specific node of the path.
      int getLength()
      Returns the length of the path (number of nodes).
      Vector getPosition(int index)
      Get the x-coordinate for the waypoint at the given index.
      java.util.ArrayList<Node> getWaypoints()
      This method returns the waypoints.
      void invert() 
      void prependWayPoint(Node n)
      Add a waypoint to the beginning of the path.
      void setWaypoints(java.util.ArrayList<Node> waypoints)
      This method sets the waypoints.

    • Method Detail

      • getWaypoints

        public java.util.ArrayList<Node> getWaypoints()
        This method returns the waypoints.
        Returns:
        the waypoints

      • setWaypoints

        public void setWaypoints(java.util.ArrayList<Node> waypoints)
        This method sets the waypoints.
        Parameters:
        waypoints - the waypoints

      • getLength

        public int getLength()
        Returns the length of the path (number of nodes).
        Returns:
        the number of nodes.

      • get

        public Node get(int index)
        This method returns a specific node of the path.
        Parameters:
        index - the index of a specific node
        Returns:
        the node at a specific index

      • getPosition

        public Vector getPosition(int index)
        Get the x-coordinate for the waypoint at the given index.
        Parameters:
        index - The index of the waypoint to get the x-coordinate of.
        Returns:
        The x coordinate at the waypoint.

      • appendWayPoint

        public void appendWayPoint(Node n)
        Append a waypoint to the end of the path.
        Parameters:
        n - the node

      • prependWayPoint

        public void prependWayPoint(Node n)
        Add a waypoint to the beginning of the path.
        Parameters:
        n - the node

      • contains

        public boolean contains(int x,
                        int y)
        Check if this path contains the WayPoint.
        Parameters:
        x - The x coordinate of the waypoint.
        y - The y coordinate of the waypoint.
        Returns:
        True if the path contains the waypoint.
